response.original_title: Playboy Video Centerfold: Reneé Tenison - Playmate of the Year 1990
response.overview: Reneé Tenison, the 1990 Playmate of the Year, dazzles in Paris and the U.S. with her charm and beauty, showcasing her allure through a sizzling centerfold shoot, intense workouts, vibrant dance sequences, and indulgent milk baths.
response.title: Playboy Video Centerfold: Reneé Tenison - Playmate of the Year 1990
